backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Asset, RepairTicket, Part, AuditEntry, AppUser, Client, ManagedUser) and stable state maps; implements user management, password hashing, and role-based access control with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module with empty OldActor and NewActor types and a no-op run function for explicit state migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (username/password login, admin Settings page, user management CRUD, role-based access control) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable fixes applied during development.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'Asset Repair Tracking System' with a root div and module script entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and TanStack Router with all page routes; shows LoginScreen when unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/AddAssetForm.tsx: Dialog form component for registering new assets with serial number, model, dynamic client dropdown (from useGetClients), status, and condition fields.
frontend/src/components/AddPartForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding a new inventory part, collecting fields like part number, name, compatible model, stock quantity, and low stock threshold, then submitting via the `useAddPart` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AssetDetailModal: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected asset, including its metadata fields and a full repair history table fetched by serial number.
frontend/src/components/CreateUserDialog: A dialog form for creating a new user account with username, password, and role fields, invoking a provided `onCreateUser` callback and showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/EditAssetForm.ts: A dialog form for editing an existing asset's model, client, status, and condition fields, submitting changes via the `useUpdateAsset` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/EditUserDialog.t: A dialog form for editing an existing user's username, optional password, and role, pre-populated from the provided user object and submitted via an `onUpdateUser` callback.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky top navigation header displaying the app logo, the current user's name and role badge, a light/dark theme toggle, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/ImportPreviewMod: Modal dialog that previews a list of serial numbers before import, categorizing them as new or duplicate and allowing the user to confirm importing only the new ones.
frontend/src/components/ImportSummaryMod: Modal dialog that displays a post-import summary showing counts of successfully imported serials, skipped duplicates, and errors from a BatchImportResult.
frontend/src/components/KPICard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a KPI metric with an icon, title, value, optional description, and accent color variants, including a skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that composes the Sidebar, Header, and main content area using either children or a TanStack Router Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login page component with username/password form fields that authenticates the user via the AuthContext login function and displays validation or API errors.
frontend/src/components/NewRepairTicketF: Dialog form for creating a new repair ticket, collecting asset serial number, fault details, technician info, outcome, and parts replaced, then submitting via the createRepairTicket mutation.
frontend/src/components/PartsReplacedEdi: Inline editor component for managing a list of replaced parts, allowing users to add, remove, select parts from a catalog, and set quantities.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Mandatory first-time setup modal that prompts a new user to enter their name and select a role, then saves the profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/RepairsByStageCh: A bar chart component that displays the count of repairs grouped by workflow stage, fetching data via the useRepairsByStage hook with theme-aware styling.
frontend/src/components/RepairTicketDeta: A modal dialog for viewing and editing repair ticket details, including diagnosis, outcome, and parts replaced, with save functionality via the updateRepairTicket mutation.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A navigation sidebar with links to all main app sections, filtering admin-only items based on user role, and displaying the current user's name and role at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A small badge component that renders a color-coded label for either an AssetStatus or RepairOutcome enum value.
frontend/src/components/StockAdjustmentM: A modal dialog for adding or removing stock quantity for a given part, submitting the delta via the updatePartStock mutation.
frontend/src/components/TopFailingModels: A horizontal bar chart showing repair counts for the top failing device models, sorted by count descending, with theme-aware styling.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting the current user to localStorage and exposing isAdmin and isAuthenticated flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor operations including assets, repair tickets, parts, audit trail, users, and clients.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Provides a React context and hook for toggling between dark and light themes, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying a CSS class to the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AssetsPage.tsx: Full-featured assets management page with a filterable/searchable table supporting add, edit, view, delete, and batch CSV import of assets, with role-based admin controls.
frontend/src/pages/AuditLogPage.tsx: Displays a paginated, searchable table of audit log entries fetched from the backend, sorted by timestamp with 25 entries per page.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Renders the main dashboard with KPI cards (total assets, in-field, in-repair, pending/completed repairs, low stock), two charts (repairs by stage, top failing models), and recent repair tickets and assets tables.
frontend/src/pages/PartsInventoryPage.ts: Displays a searchable parts inventory table with low-stock alerts, and allows admins to add new parts and adjust stock levels via modals.
frontend/src/pages/RepairTicketsPage.tsx: Shows a filterable, searchable table of repair tickets with stage and keyword filters, and allows admins to create new tickets and view or edit existing ones via modals.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Provides analytics charts and lists including top repaired assets, technician workload, most replaced parts, repeated fault assets, and a configurable yearly repair limit alert.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Admin-only settings page for managing users (create, edit, delete) and clients (add, edit, delete), with access control redirecting non-admins away.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utility functions to export assets and repair tickets as CSV files, handling value escaping and triggering a browser download.
frontend/src/utils/fileParser.ts: Utility for parsing batch serial number imports from .xlsx, .xls, .csv, and .txt files, extracting values from the first column (or each line for TXT) while auto-detecting and skipping header rows. Dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN for Excel parsing.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Provides formatting helper functions for timestamps, asset statuses, repair outcomes, and user roles, plus bigint/Date conversion utilities and static lists of models, clients, statuses, outcomes, and roles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, extending the theme with CSS-variable-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, accordion animations, and registering the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state including version, summary, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features covering authentication, role-based access control, sidebar navigation, and user management.
